---
title: "Xinyu Luo"
---

I am a PhD student in Polymer Science and Engineering at UMass Amherst, working in Steve Granick's research group.

This is my personal academic website and a small personal corner online.

## Research interests

- Microplastics
- Active matter
- Biomaterials and interfaces
- Surface chemistry

## Contact

Email: xinyuluo@umass.com
